meta.title: Flirtcity — Find Your Gem in the City | LGBTQ+ Dating & Chat
meta.description: Shine bright. Match right. Flirtcity is the premium LGBTQ+ dating app where real connections happen. Download now for iOS and Android.
meta.ogTitle: Flirtcity — Find Your Gem in the City
meta.ogDescription: The premium LGBTQ+ dating app where real connections happen. Shine bright. Match right.

hero.heading: Find your gem in the city
hero.description: Flirtcity is a fully inclusive LGBTQ+ dating app designed for everyone across the spectrum — welcoming lesbian, gay, bi, trans, queer, nonbinary people, and all identities that make our community shine. Built for real connection, comfort, and self-expression, Flirtcity helps you meet people who match your vibe and honor your authenticity. With a vibrant and growing global community, it redefines queer dating by celebrating every identity, every attraction, and every kind of relationship. Because love isn't one-size-fits-all — and in Flirtcity, you can always shine bright and match right.

whyChoose.sectionTitle: Why Choose Flirtcity as Your Dating App?

stories.title: Meaningful Chats That Flow
stories.quote: This is a great experience. I'm feeling well when I text with someone on Taimi. We respect each other.

stories.title: Effortless Onboarding
stories.quote: Get started in minutes with FlirtCity's smooth, inclusive sign-up flow. Customize your identity, pronouns, and what you're looking for — no pressure, no boxes that don't fit. Just you, shining from the start.

stories.title: Curated Matches, Real Connections
stories.quote: FlirtCity filters through the noise to bring you people who actually match your vibe. Smart suggestions prioritize compatibility, authenticity, and shared energy — helping you match right, every time.

stories.title: Vibrant City Discovery
stories.quote: Explore your city through LGBTQ+ lenses. From local hotspots to upcoming queer events, FlirtCity helps you find not only people, but places where you can feel seen, welcomed, and connected.

downloadCta.heading: Discover Your Queer Community Instantly
downloadCta.description:
Download Flirtcity and step into a space made for real LGBTQ+ connections.
Be yourself, meet people who match your vibe, and explore a safe, vibrant community where you can truly shine.
